prs.title: Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
## GitHub Activity Summary — Universal Tuya Zigbee

### 🆕 New Device Requests (Open Issues)

| FP | Device | Driver | Source |
|----|--------|--------|--------|
| `_TZ3040_o4mkahkc` | PIR Motion Detector (TS0202) | *Needs assignment* | [#1392](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1392) |
| `_TZ3000_qja6nq5z` | Smart Knob Switch (TS004F) | *Needs assignment* | [#1389](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1389) |
| `_TZ3000_baeiitad` | Water Leakage Sensor (TS0207) | *Needs assignment* | [#1380](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1380) |
| `_TZE284_aaeasoll` | SmarterCurry Solar Lux Sensor | *Needs assignment* | [#1379](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1379) |
| `_TYST11_jeaxp72v` | Unknown Tuya Device | *Needs assignment* | [#1373](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1373) |
| `_TZ3000_enmfaave` | 4-Gang Switch (TS0004) | *Needs assignment* | [#1368](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1368) |

**Note:** Issues #305, #312, #314, #316 — all reported FPs already exist in the correct drivers (`garage_door_opener`, `valve_irrigation`, `button_wireless_1`, `climate_sensor`). Users likely need to re-pair or update app version.

### ✅ Already Supported (Batch Fingerprint Issues)

The May 2026 community batch added **3 new unique FPs** (`_TZ3000_ztc6ggyl`, `_TZ3000_akwixq9i`, `_TZ3000_hiqrjkxx`) plus confirmed **~100+ existing FPs** across 12 closed batch issues (247, 252–257, 261–265, 268–271, 277, 286–292). Major coverage additions: **curtain motors** (40+ FPs), **dimmer wall switches** (30+ FPs), **climate sensors** (50+ FPs), **contact/motion sensors** (15+ FPs), plus `air_quality_comprehensive`, `air_purifier`, `gas_detector`, `radiator_valve`, `water_valve_smart`, and more.

### 🔀 Fork Fingerprints to Integrate (JohanBendz → dlnraja)

These FPs exist in the JohanBendz fork with driver assignments and should be merged upstream:

| FP | Driver(s) | Issue |
|----|-----------|-------|
| `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia` | `dimmer_wall_1gang` | [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350) |
| `_TZ3210_weaqkhab` | `dimmer_wall_1gang` | [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350) |
| `_TZE200_pay2byax` | (3 new devices) | [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253) |
| `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p` | (3 new devices) | [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253) |
| `_TZ3000_gjrubzje` | `switch_1gang` | [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya
